name: What's workers' comp vs suing in Idaho construction cases?
description: Comp for basics; sue for extras like pain.

mainEntity.name: What's workers' comp vs suing in Idaho construction cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for basics; sue for extras like pain.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp is no-fault, quick medical/wages; suing third-parties adds pain damages but needs proof.** Exclusive vs employer[2]. **Key factors:** 1. Comp: Limited benefits. 2. Suit: Full recovery, 2-year limit. 3. Can do both. 4. Fault matters in suits. Pursue comp first, sue if others negligent. Lawyer coordinates.
